contentBlocks.translation: The charmer of Anjana, the brave hero, the destroyer of the grief ofJanaki, the chief of monkeys, the controller of sensory organs, I salute that terror of Lanka.
contentBlocks.meanings: अञ्जना (añjanā) – Anjana; नन्दनं (nandanaṃ) – son; वीरं (vīraṃ) – hero; जानकी (jānakī) – Janaki; शोक (śoka) – grief; नाशनम् (nāśanam) – destroyer; कपीशम् (kapīśam) – chief of monkeys; अक्ष (akṣa) – sensory organs; हन्तारं (hantāraṃ) – controller; वन्दे (vande) – I salute; लङ्का (laṅkā) – Lanka; भयङ्करम् (bhayaṅkaram) – terror;
